TypeSignature.Value: .class public sequential ansi sealed beforefieldinit SKFourByteTag extends System.ValueType implements class System.IEquatable`1<valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag>

Docs.summary: Represents a four-byte OpenType or FreeType tag packed into a single unsigned integer.

.method public hidebysig specialname rtspecialname instance void .ctor(unsigned int32 value) cil managed

Docs.param: The packed four-byte tag as an unsigned integer, with the first character in the most significant byte.
Docs.summary: Initializes a new instance of the struct from a packed integer value.

Docs.param: The first (most significant) character of the tag.
The second character of the tag.
The third character of the tag.
The fourth (least significant) character of the tag.

MemberSignature.Value: public static SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse (string? tag);
.method public static hidebysig valuetype SkiaSharp.SKFourByteTag Parse(string tag) cil managed

Docs.param: The string to parse. Only the first four characters are used; shorter strings are right-padded with spaces. or empty returns a zero tag.
Docs.returns: An parsed from the string, right-padded with spaces if the string is shorter than four characters.

MemberSignature.Value: public override string ToString ();
.method public hidebysig virtual instance string ToString() cil managed

Docs.summary: Returns a string representation of the four-byte tag.
Docs.returns: A four-character string representing the tag, with each byte decoded as an ASCII character.
